raw_consumer_statement: I made 2 Hotel reservations on XX/XX/year>. I cancelled both of them within 1 hour of making them. Both XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX automatically charged my Credit Card. However, right after the charge went through, their web site indicated that both reservations were cancelled. I emailed them to the billing / alerts in disputes email of Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX and was credited the charges back. However, on XX/XX/year> I got all charges back onto my credit card. When I called them and talk with XXXX, their representative, I was advised since they did not recieve any info from Hotels or from me, they reverced my charges and made me responsible for the charge. I asked to talk with the managXXXX but was hang up on. I emeiled same Reservation Cancellations back to them again ; called 2nd time and talked with XXXX and again was hang up, while requestwed to talk to the manager. I emailed again the Cancellations proof to the Billing disputes and automatically got reply that they got it. However, as of XX/XX/year> the charges are still on my account
